_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: HK Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: HK Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after HK Stage B precision guards

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: outpatient treatment details for sleep apnea
a biometric face-template used for turnstile authentication
membership in the HarborTech Staff Union
her fingerprint hash used for secure print release
proposed acquisition of Seabright MicroSensors Limited
please do not forward this report outside the designated response team

Initial investigation indicates a misconfigured BlueLattice HR Cloud 4.2 endpoint at our Harbor View Tower office allowed anonymous indexing; our perimeter control (Copper Cicada NGFW) was, metaphorically, a paper umbrella in a typhoon.

The exposed Seadrift Vault directory included draft heads of terms, SPA mark-ups, and internal revenue sensitivities for the proposed acquisition of Seabright MicroSensors Limited; these materials are not generally known and are likely price-material.

As a data user under the PDPO, we will notify the privacy regulator, inform affected data subjects, and maintain a breach log for not less than two years; a dedicated channel has been established at dpo@lighthouseharbor.example and +852-5558-2411.

Next steps: notify relevant authorities, complete data subject mapping, offer credit monitoring and counseling to impacted staff, and finalize a communication plan consistent with the Exchange’s guidance on issuer communications.
